segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving forward toward the Sector 7 Station as a dark sedan passes by in the foreground. The historic building fades into the distance on the right while the station arch and platform structures become more prominent ahead. The muddy street shows deep tire tracks as the camera approaches the station entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban intersection that gradually opens up toward a distant, illuminated transit hub. It begins at a muddy crossroads dominated by an ornate historic building on the right, where a beige sedan drives across the frame through deep tire tracks under the warm glow of street lamps. As the camera moves forward, it pans left to reveal the glowing Sector 7 Station arch sign in the distance, causing the historic architecture to recede as the road expands toward the station approach. The scene then shifts further toward the entrance as a dark sedan passes through the foreground, with the station's platform structures becoming more prominent against the night sky. Finally, the camera advances deeper into the muddy street, focusing on the illuminated archway as the surrounding city buildings fade into the background.
